# imageBrowserView()

**Instance Method**

Returns the view the receiver uses to display the cell.

## Declaration

```swift
func imageBrowserView() -> IKImageBrowserView!
```

## Return Value

The browser view containing the cell.

## Discussion

Subclasses should not override this method.
